sources.name: Companies House Advanced Search API
sources.attribution: Data sourced from Companies House under the Open Government Licence v3.0. Free to cite with attribution to Contractor Tax Accountants (contractortaxaccountants.co.uk).

meta.attribution: UK Contractor Index data compiled from Companies House public records (Open Government Licence v3.0). Free to cite with attribution to Contractor Tax Accountants.
meta.notes: Incorporation counts are gross (dissolved companies remain on the register; no survivorship bias). Union is the deduplicated count across all 13 contractor SIC codes -- a company registering multiple SIC codes from the set is counted once. The most recent 2 months are provisional (Companies House indexing lag) and are excluded from headline figures and decade comparisons. The index is a proxy for personal service company (PSC) formation, not a direct count of contractors.
